title: 建筑美学
subtitle: Architectural Aesthetics, Design, Urban Architecture
assistant_message: Learn to discuss architectural aesthetics, design principles, and the relationship between architecture and culture.

examples.chinese: 建筑不仅满足功能需求，而且体现文化精神。
examples.translation: Architecture not only meets functional needs but also embodies cultural spirit.
examples.translation_id: Arsitektur tidak hanya memenuhi kebutuhan fungsional tetapi juga mewujudkan semangat budaya.

examples.chinese: 在建筑美学方面，东西方有不同理解。
examples.translation: In the aspect of architectural aesthetics, East and West have different understandings.
examples.translation_id: Dalam aspek estetika arsitektur, Timur dan Barat memiliki pemahaman yang berbeda.

examples.chinese: 通过建筑设计来创造美好的生活空间。
examples.translation: Create beautiful living spaces through architectural design.
examples.translation_id: Ciptakan ruang hidup yang indah melalui desain arsitektur.

dialogue.speaker: male
dialogue.name: Wu Di
dialogue.chinese: 建筑不仅满足功能需求，而且体现文化精神。你觉得什么是好的建筑？
dialogue.pinyin: Jiànzhù bùjǐn mǎnzú gōngnéng xūqiú, érqiě tǐxiàn wénhuà jīngshén. Nǐ juéde shénme shì hǎo de jiànzhù?
dialogue.translation: Architecture not only meets functional needs but also embodies cultural spirit. What do you think makes good architecture?
dialogue.translation_id: Arsitektur tidak hanya memenuhi kebutuhan fungsional tetapi juga mewujudkan semangat budaya. Menurut Anda, apa yang membuat arsitektur menjadi baik?

dialogue.speaker: female
dialogue.name: Han Xue
dialogue.chinese: 在建筑美学方面，东西方有不同理解。好的建筑应该与环境和社区和谐。
dialogue.pinyin: Zài jiànzhù měixué fāngmiàn, dōngxī fāng yǒu bùtóng lǐjiě. Hǎo de jiànzhù yīnggāi yǔ huánjìng hé shèqū héxié.
dialogue.translation: In architectural aesthetics, East and West have different understandings. Good architecture should be in harmony with the environment and community.
dialogue.translation_id: Dalam estetika arsitektur, Timur dan Barat memiliki pemahaman yang berbeda. Arsitektur yang baik harus selaras dengan lingkungan dan masyarakat.

dialogue.speaker: male
dialogue.name: Wu Di
dialogue.chinese: 如何平衡传统风格和创新设计？
dialogue.pinyin: Rúhé pínghéng chuántǒng fēnggé hé chuàngxīn shèjì?
dialogue.translation: How to balance traditional style and innovative design?
dialogue.translation_id: Bagaimana menyeimbangkan gaya tradisional dan desain inovatif?

dialogue.speaker: female
dialogue.name: Han Xue
dialogue.chinese: 通过建筑设计来创造美好的生活空间。可持续建筑是未来方向，既尊重传统又拥抱创新。
dialogue.pinyin: Tōngguò jiànzhù shèjì lái chuàngzào měihǎo de shēnghuó kōngjiān. Kě chíxù jiànzhù shì wèilái fāngxiàng, jì zūnzhòng chuántǒng yòu yōngbào chuàngxīn.
dialogue.translation: Create beautiful living spaces through architectural design. Sustainable architecture is the future direction, respecting tradition while embracing innovation.
dialogue.translation_id: Ciptakan ruang hidup yang indah melalui desain arsitektur. Arsitektur berkelanjutan adalah arah masa depan, menghormati tradisi sambil merangkul inovasi.

exercises.question: How to say 'sustainable architecture' in Chinese?
Complete: 建筑不仅满足功能需求，______体现文化精神。
